reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: The Samsung AC Light Control integration needs to re-authenticate with SmartThings.

abort.already_configured: This SmartThings location is already configured.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.
abort.missing_scopes: Authentication failed. Please make sure you granted all the requested SmartThings permissions (devices and locations).
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The authenticated SmartThings account does not match the one already configured.
abort.no_locations: No SmartThings locations found. Please ensure you have at least one location set up in SmartThings.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to SmartThings. Please try again.

application_credentials.description:
To control your Samsung AC display lights you need to create a SmartThings OAuth application and enter its **Client ID** and **Client Secret** here.

1. Open the [SmartThings Developer Workspace]({developer_console_url}) (or use the SmartThings CLI) and create a new **OAuth-In SmartApp**.
2. Grant the scopes `r:locations:*`, `r:devices:*` and `x:devices:*`.
3. Set the redirect URI to `{redirect_url}`.
4. Copy the generated Client ID and Client Secret into the fields below.

See the [setup instructions]({more_info_url}) for full details.
